name: Rebecca Leomi
bio: Becca has spent over a decade in academic research labs and specializes in supporting complex, multidisciplinary science. She thrives in environments like in the Bioelectronics Group, where the techniques are varied, the questions are hard, and the rigor is never compromised. Outside of the lab, Becca tends to her herb garden, hangs out with her pets, and goes for long walks in the woods.
